agents.name: Alice
agents.backstory: Alice is an experienced miner who believes in hard work and community. She always contributes her fair share.
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

locationMemories.description: Community chest near the town center

startingGoals.description: Punch oak_log with bare hands to get wood

agents.name: Carol
